name: Bscscan
description: Retrieve BNB balances and normal transaction history through the current unified Etherscan API V2 successor to BscScan's legacy API.

auth.hint: Create an Etherscan API V2 key and send it in the apikey query parameter. Legacy BscScan keys do not work with V2.

tools.name: get_bnb_balance
tools.description: Retrieve the current native BNB balance for a BNB Smart Chain address.

params.name: chainid
params.description: BNB Smart Chain mainnet chain ID; set this to 56.

params.name: module
params.description: API module; set this to account.

params.name: action
params.description: API action; set this to balance.

params.name: address
params.description: BNB Smart Chain address with a 0x prefix.

params.name: tag
params.description: Use latest for the current balance, or a hexadecimal block number within the most recent 128 blocks.

tools.name: list_bnb_transactions
tools.description: List normal transactions for a BNB Smart Chain address.

params.name: chainid
params.description: BNB Smart Chain mainnet chain ID; set this to 56.

params.name: module
params.description: API module; set this to account.

params.name: action
params.description: API action; set this to txlist.

params.name: address
params.description: BNB Smart Chain address with a 0x prefix.

params.name: sort
params.description: Sort direction: asc or desc; defaults to asc.
